_comment_transport: Two transport modes are supported. Use ONE block below, not both.
STDIO MODE (default — recommended for Jenkins-triggered pipelines):
Claude Code spawns each server as a subprocess. Credentials are
injected per-session by Jenkins. Use the 'mcpServers' block below.
SSE MODE (for standalone testing or shared team server):
Then replace the 'mcpServers' block with the 'mcpServersUrl' block below.

mcpServers._comment: STDIO MODE — active by default. Remove this block when using SSE.

_mcpServersUrl_comment: SSE MODE — replace 'mcpServers' above with this block (rename by removing the leading underscore).
Start the gateway first: MCP_TRANSPORT=sse MCP_PORT=8000 python -m mcp_gateway.server
